vibe: Clean, modern corporate (Linear style), authoritative, dense control room

headings.usage: H1-H4, large numeric displays, major section titles. Never use generic sans.

monospace.usage: Agent tags, timestamps, code snippets, metadata, status labels, execution logs.

rules: Avoid default bolding. Use weight contrasts (e.g., Light heading vs Bold tag).
Overlines and labels MUST be JetBrains Mono, uppercase, with tracking.

structure: Full viewport height (h-screen) with no page-level scroll. Scroll happens within individual panels.
Outer grid: grid-cols-12, gap-px, bg-border/40 to create precise 1px separators between panels.

panels.left_sidebar: col-span-12 md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-2 flex flex-col h-full bg-[#0A0A0A]
panels.center_boardroom: col-span-12 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col h-full bg-[#111111]
panels.right_sidebar: col-span-12 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 flex flex-col h-full bg-[#0A0A0A]
panels.bottom_execution_bar: Fixed or sticky to the bottom of the center panel, highly visible, spanning full width of the boardroom panel.

rules: No gaps between main panels; rely entirely on 1px solid borders for separation.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.
Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.

micro_themes.surface: Grid Borders (Technical Look). App skeleton exposed via borders. 1px solid #222222 everywhere.
micro_themes.radius: rounded-sm (max 4px). Linear style is sharp and precise. No pill-shaped buttons unless it's a very specific badge.
micro_themes.shadows: Virtually none. Rely on border contrast. Occasional shadow-sm for active dropdowns or modals with a 1px border (#222222) wrapping the modal.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0030FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0025CC] rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide transition-colors px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#222222] text-white hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-sm px-4 py-2

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-[#141414] border border-[#222222] focus:border-[#0030FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0030FF] rounded-sm text-white px-3 py-2
inputs_and_forms.labels: JetBrains Mono text-xs text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 block

cards_and_tasks.style: bg-[#111111] border border-[#222222] hover:border-[#333333] transition-colors p-3 rounded-sm flex flex-col gap-2 cursor-pointer

agent_dialogue_message.name_tag: font-mono text-[11px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#222222]
agent_dialogue_message.content: text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-zinc-300 bg-[#1A1A1A]/50 p-3 rounded-sm border-l-2
agent_dialogue_message.rule: Left border color maps to agent_roles (e.g., HR = Pink, Dev = Blue)

components.shadcn_overrides: Force flat rectangles, remove excessive padding, remove default Vercel-like shadows. Strip out ring-offset on focus.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (e.g. #111111 to #1A1A1A). Text color transitions from zinc-400 to white.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-in (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y-1 to 0) for dialogue messages and task list items.
motion_and_interactions.typing_indicator: Use a subtle pulsing opacity on a JetBrains Mono '...' inside the dialogue transcript.

assets_and_icons.icons: lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5. Sizes typically 16px (w-4 h-4) for inline, 20px (w-5 h-5) for standalone.
assets_and_icons.avatars: Do not use placeholder images. Use CSS-based abstract initials inside squares (e.g. [HR], [CEO]) with JetBrains Mono, or sharp Lucide icons (User, Code, Terminal, Briefcase) colored according to their role.

boardroom.left_panel: Participant List: vertical list of agents, with an active/idle status dot (green/grey).
boardroom.center_panel: Live Dialogue Transcript: scrollable area. Looks like a sleek command-line / chat hybrid. Strict chronological order.
boardroom.right_panel: Tabs: [Agenda] [Approvals] [Delegation]. Content switches below. Dense task cards.
boardroom.bottom_panel: Execution Area. Summarizes 'Next Action: Deploy Backend' with a massive primary button spanning the width.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against #0A0A0A / #111111 meets APCA guidelines. Minimum text color #71717A against #111111.
accessibility.focus: focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0030FF] on all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
